steps.title: Identify the boundary line
steps.content:
The boundary line passes through $(0,1)$ and has slope $-4$, so its equation is:
$$y=1-4x$$
That eliminates the choices with $1+4x$.

steps.title: Use the shading direction
steps.content:
The shaded region is above the boundary line. A point in the shaded region, such as $(2,0)$, satisfies:
$$0\gt1-4(2)=-7$$
So the inequality is $y\gt1-4x$.

steps.title: Graph-check the answer
steps.content: In Desmos, graph the candidate inequality $y>1-4x$. It has the same negative-slope boundary and shades above the line.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The inequality is $y>1-4x$, which is choice D. So D is correct.
